meta.title: AVATIR
meta.description: AVATIR — corporate surety insurance management platform.

brand.name: AVATIR
brand.shellDescription: Manage producers, requests, documents, and policy emissions from one operational workspace.

hero.heading: Digitalize caución operations in one place.
hero.subtext: AVATIR connects producers, operations teams, and insurers in a single platform to manage surety requests, documentation, approvals, and policy issuance — starting with a focused MVP built for speed and future scale.

aboutUs.title: Built for surety operations teams
aboutUs.body: AVATIR centralizes surety requests, documents, and policy emissions instead of juggling spreadsheets and email threads, giving operations, producers, and insurers one shared source of truth.

benefits.centralize: Centralize surety requests, documents, and policy emissions instead of juggling spreadsheets and email threads.
benefits.workflow: Run each request through a structured workflow — from draft to review, approval, and issuance — with full status history.
benefits.partners: Manage producers, companies, and portfolio relationships with role-based access and commercial portfolio protection.
benefits.traceability: Keep complete traceability with change history, comments, approvals, rejections, and basic access audit.

products.label: MVP scope
products.title: Built for the core business flow
products.detail: The first release covers the end-to-end operational flow without complex real-time insurer integrations. Operations can work assisted today; insurer portals and APIs come in later phases.

auth.signInDescription: Sign in to manage surety requests, track workflow status, and access documents and emissions for your team.
auth.signUpDescription: Set up access for producers, operators, and administrators who will run surety operations on the platform.
auth.googleReady: Google sign-in will be available in a later release.
auth.googlePending: Google sign-in will be connected once OAuth credentials are configured.

nextSteps.title: Next steps
nextSteps.body: Add list, create, edit, and detail flows for users and agreements. The shell is already mobile-first and ready for data.

googleAuth.title: Google auth
googleAuth.body: The login button is in place now. The next backend step is wiring real OAuth credentials and a session token.

users.title: Users
users.description: This is the first placeholder view for the users management flow.

agreements.title: Agreements
agreements.description: This placeholder view gives the agreements workflow a clean starting point.
